title: Sika Australia Pty Ltd — Environmental impact
investigation_objective: The NSW Environment Protection Authority fined Sika Australia $30,000 (7 February 2025) after an inspection of its Wetherill Park facility found flammable chemicals stockpiled and stored outside, cement spilled next to a stormwater drain, and a damaged reactor vessel leaking chemicals in a zone classified as having an explosive gas atmosphere. The EPA also issued a Clean Up Notice requiring the reactor to be taken out of use until repaired and site chemical-storage practices improved.
scope: Fined $30,000 by the NSW EPA over dangerous chemical storage practices; Regulator found a damaged reactor vessel leaking chemicals in an explosive-gas-atmosphere zone; Issued a Clean Up Notice requiring remediation before the reactor could be used again
